title: FURNITURE SHARE - 211info
text: FURNITURE SHARE FURNITURE SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides used furniture, kitchen, household goods, and food boxes. Accepts furniture, kitchen, and household goods donations. Limited donation pick up is available. 4550 Marion Steet SE Suite C Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Furniture Distribution: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Furniture Drop Off: Friday 9am-4pm Furniture Pickup: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 754-9511 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 754-9511 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred by a partner agency. Referral agencies can include state or local social services agencies, local non-profit agencies, or churches. If prospective clients don't have a caseworker or are unsure how to access assistance, call to find a referral agency. Donations: Visit website for a list of accepted items and request pickup FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Benton, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, and Marion Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of Marion Street SE and 41st Street. The agency is in the warehouse on the corner. Services: Appliance Donation Programs Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Mattress Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FURNITURE SHARE
